title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is a web-based tool for generating complete brand identities using AI, including logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. The platform uses plain-English chat editing and auto-applies brand consistency across 500,000+ templates without manual re-coloring. It also includes features like AI background removal, animated logo generation, and name/domain suggestions.
writeup: The video walks through Design.com, a web-based AI tool for building a complete brand identity rather than a single logo. It covers generation of logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates, with brand consistency auto-applied across more than 500,000 templates so manual re-coloring is unnecessary. Editing runs through plain-English chat, and the platform adds AI background removal, animated logo generation, and name and domain suggestions.
